acquisition method: top ten data-dependent acquisition MS method
alkylation reagent: Samples were alkylated with 50 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature for 30 min
cleavage agent: Samples were digested to peptides using trypsin/Lys-C
enrichment method: phospho-samples were further enriched by TiO2 phosphopeptide enrichment kit
instrument: Easy-nLC 1200-Orbitrap Q Exactive Plus mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: 1 mM DTT in kinase buffer B
reduction concentration: 1 mM DTT in kinase buffer B
